evidence.base_media.value: tumoroids were extracted from head and neck cancer surgical resection following the protocol developed by Driehus et al. [22] and cultured in advanced DMEM/F12 supplemented with GlutaMax
evidence.matrix.percent: The tumoroids were plated at 2500 cells/10 µL of 70% Cultrex UltiMatrix reduced growth factor basement membrane Extract
evidence.matrix.name: The tumoroids were plated at 2500 cells/10 µL of 70% Cultrex UltiMatrix reduced growth factor basement membrane Extract
evidence.matrix.cell_density: The tumoroids were plated at 2500 cells/10 µL of 70% Cultrex UltiMatrix reduced growth factor basement membrane Extract
evidence.source_cells.cell_type: tumoroids were extracted from head and neck cancer surgical resection
evidence.source_cells.species: patients — human tissue origin, informed patient consent obtained
evidence.GlutaMax: cultured in advanced DMEM/F12 supplemented with GlutaMax, Penicilin/streptomycin, 10 mM HEPES
evidence.HEPES: cultured in advanced DMEM/F12 supplemented with GlutaMax, Penicilin/streptomycin, 10 mM HEPES
evidence.Penicillin/streptomycin: cultured in advanced DMEM/F12 supplemented with GlutaMax, Penicilin/streptomycin, 10 mM HEPES
evidence.RSPO3-Fc: 4% (col/col) RSPO3-Fc fusion protein conditioned medium (ImmunoPrecise, IPATherapeutics, Utrecht, Netherlands)
evidence.treatment_timeline: The tumoroids were treated with the solvent, 30 nM CTX, 5 µM RSL3, 1 mM metformin or co-treatments 7 days after plating for an additional 10 days.

base_media.name.correction_reason: Silver extractor dropped 'advanced' qualifier. Full verbatim: 'cultured in advanced DMEM/F12 supplemented with GlutaMax'

matrix.percent.correction_reason: Silver extractor returned null. Full verbatim: '70% Cultrex UltiMatrix reduced growth factor basement membrane Extract'

notes: Gold candidate for HNSCC patient-derived tumoroid protocol (Driehus et al. adaptation). Silver evaluation scored 92% precision (22/24 fields correct). Two fields corrected: (1) base_media.name: silver extracted 'DMEM/F12'; correct value is 'advanced DMEM/F12' per verbatim text; (2) matrix.percent: silver extracted null; correct value is 70% per verbatim plating description. Five recall misses noted and flagged: A83-01 (500 nM, TGFβ/ALK inhibitor), CHIR99021 (0.3 µM, GSK3 inhibitor/Wnt agonist), GlutaMax (base media supplement), HEPES at 10 mM (base media supplement), and treatment timeline (day 7 post-plating, 10-day duration). Caspofungin (0.5 µg/mL antifungal) verified present and included in media_supplements. RSPO3-Fc and Noggin-Fc supplied as conditioned media at 4% vol/vol each. Treatment agents (cetuximab 30 nM, RSL3 5 µM, metformin 1 mM) were pharmacological challenge conditions, not culture media components; they are captured in treatment_timeline for completeness. Silver precision remains high at 22/24 for the 24 fields evaluated.
verification_note: rhowardstone human sign-off 2026-06-22; candidate drafted by agentA-subagent; values independently cross-checked vs Opus multi-modal silver adjudication (PR #126) — two independent reads agree on source truth incl. extractor-error corrections
